description: Mapping from model id → human-facing UIs where a user can paste the rewritten prompt and generate. Used by external_prompt_only mode.

gpt-image-1.name: ChatGPT (image generation)
gpt-image-1.notes: Plus / Pro account only. Supports in-conversation generation and basic transparency. Validate alpha after download — text >3 words may still garble.

gpt-image-1.name: OpenAI Platform Playground
gpt-image-1.notes: Set Output Format=png and Background=transparent for RGBA. Model=gpt-image-1.

gpt-image-1.5.name: ChatGPT (image generation)
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Same surface as 1.0; 1.5 rolls out behind the same UI with sharper output.

dall-e-3.name: ChatGPT (DALL·E)
dall-e-3.notes: Deprecated 2026-05-12 in favor of gpt-image-1. Prefer that if available.

imagen-4.name: Google AI Studio (Imagen 4)
imagen-4.notes: No transparent-background support. Ask for 'solid pure white background' and matte afterwards via asset_remove_background.

imagen-4.name: Vertex AI Studio
imagen-4.notes: Requires GCP project. Same transparency limitation as AI Studio.

imagen-3.name: Google AI Studio (Imagen 3)
imagen-3.notes: Same checkerboard-as-RGB problem as Imagen 4. Matte externally.

gemini-3-flash-image.name: Google AI Studio (Nano Banana)
gemini-3-flash-image.notes: The Gemini 2.5 / 3 Flash Image model is nicknamed 'Nano Banana' in the community. Strong multimodal-edit (attach reference images, up to 3); no transparent output — matte afterwards via asset_remove_background.

gemini-3-flash-image.name: Gemini app
gemini-3-flash-image.notes: Consumer-facing Gemini web/app. Accepts prompt + reference images.

gemini-3-pro-image.name: Vertex AI Studio (Nano Banana Pro)
gemini-3-pro-image.notes: The Pro variant of Nano Banana — higher aesthetic than the Flash tier. Still no transparent output; matte externally.

gemini-3-pro-image.name: Google AI Studio
gemini-3-pro-image.notes: Selectable as gemini-3-pro-image-preview when available in your region.

sdxl.name: Stability AI Playground
sdxl.notes: Tag-salad prompt style. negative_prompt IS a real sampler feature here — use it.

sdxl.name: Leonardo.Ai
sdxl.notes: SDXL-based. Decent LoRA library for brand locking.

sd-1.5.name: Civitai Generator
sd-1.5.notes: Tag-salad. 77-token CLIP limit — front-load the important tags.

flux-schnell.name: fal.ai flux-schnell
flux-schnell.notes: Apache 2.0 open weights. Fastest Flux; lowest text-rendering fidelity. Good for iteration, not shipping wordmarks.

flux-dev.name: fal.ai flux/dev
flux-dev.notes: Open-weights Flux dev checkpoint (non-commercial). LoRA trainable.

sd3-large.name: Stability AI Playground (SD3)
sd3-large.notes: Prose-friendly input (not tag-salad). negative_prompt is a real field here.

playground-v3.name: Playground AI
playground-v3.notes: Prose + negative prompt. Commercial-use license on paid tiers.

leonardo-phoenix.name: Leonardo.Ai
leonardo-phoenix.notes: Phoenix 1.0 preset. Good for editorial/illustration. Image Guidance enables ref-based composition.

leonardo-diffusion-xl.name: Leonardo.Ai (Diffusion XL)
leonardo-diffusion-xl.notes: SDXL-based preset with Leonardo presets + Elements (LoRA-style style packs).

krea-image-1.name: Krea
krea-image-1.notes: Realtime canvas + image-1 generation. Paste prompt, iterate live. Matte externally.

flux-pro.name: BFL Playground
flux-pro.notes: Official Flux UI. Paste prose narrative. Do NOT use negative_prompt — Flux errors on it.

flux-pro.name: fal.ai
flux-pro.notes: Prose prompt. Good for photoreal hero art.

flux-pro.name: Replicate
flux-pro.notes: Same Flux surface hosted on Replicate.

flux-2.name: BFL Playground
flux-2.notes: Flux.2 accepts up to 8 brand reference images — upload your brand style refs for consistency.

flux-kontext-pro.name: BFL Playground (Kontext)
flux-kontext-pro.notes: Edit-only. Upload the source asset + give an instruction prompt. Use quoted strings for literal text swaps: Replace 'ACME' with 'ZENO'. Preserves identity across the edit.

flux-kontext-pro.name: fal.ai flux-pro/kontext
flux-kontext-pro.notes: Good for an iterative family (logo → favicon → OG card) from one master. Keep replacement text similar length to the original.

flux-kontext-pro.name: Replicate flux-kontext-pro
flux-kontext-pro.notes: Same Kontext surface on Replicate. No negative prompt; describe the target, not what to avoid.

fal-flux-pro.name: fal.ai flux-pro
fal-flux-pro.notes: Aggregator path to Flux Pro — same model as BFL, different billing.

fal-flux-2.name: fal.ai flux-2
fal-flux-2.notes: Aggregator path to Flux.2. Upload up to 8 reference images for brand consistency.

fal-sdxl.name: fal.ai fast-sdxl
fal-sdxl.notes: Cheap SDXL iteration. Tag-salad prompt; native negative_prompt support.

midjourney-v6.name: Midjourney web (v6)
midjourney-v6.notes: Paste prompt; append --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6. Use --sref / --cref for consistency.

midjourney-v7.name: Midjourney web
midjourney-v7.notes: Paste prompt; append --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 7. Use --sref / --cref / --mref for brand consistency.

ideogram-3.name: Ideogram web (v3)
ideogram-3.notes: Full Ideogram 3 (not the Turbo variant). Higher fidelity for dense typography; slower + costlier per gen.

ideogram-3-turbo.name: Ideogram web
ideogram-3-turbo.notes: Best-in-class wordmark rendering for 1–3 word brand text. For RGBA output set Style = Transparent (v3 feature). Consider toggling Magic Prompt OFF if you want exact control.

recraft-v3.name: Recraft web
recraft-v3.notes: Pick 'Vector' style for real SVG output. Brand Styles panel locks palette + style across a set.

firefly-3.name: Adobe Firefly
firefly-3.notes: Commercial-indemnity output; useful when license matters. Limited style library vs Flux/Midjourney.

pollinations-flux.name: Pollinations (Flux backend)
pollinations-flux.notes: Zero-key, HTTP GET. Example: curl -o out.png 'https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/<urlencoded>?model=flux&width=1024&height=1024&nologo=true'. ~1 req/15s anonymous; RGB only (matte externally).

pollinations-turbo.name: Pollinations (Turbo preset)
pollinations-turbo.notes: Fastest Pollinations preset. Use ?model=turbo in the URL.

pollinations-kontext.name: Pollinations (Kontext edit)
pollinations-kontext.notes: Free in-context edit via ?model=kontext — give the source image URL as &image=...

pollinations-sd.name: Pollinations (stable-diffusion preset)
pollinations-sd.notes: Legacy SD 1.5 via ?model=stable-diffusion — fall-back for cheap iteration.

horde-sdxl.name: Stable Horde (SDXL)
horde-sdxl.notes: Anonymous kudos bucket works (apikey=0000000000); queue-based. Set HORDE_API_KEY for priority.

horde-flux.name: Stable Horde (Flux Schnell)
horde-flux.notes: Flux.1-Schnell fp8 on the horde. Worker availability varies.

hf-sdxl.name: Hugging Face Inference (SDXL)
hf-sdxl.notes: Free tier — needs HF_TOKEN (https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens, no credit card). Cold-start latency.

hf-sd3.name: Hugging Face Inference (SD3 Medium)
hf-sd3.notes: Free tier; check SD3 Medium research license before commercial use.

hf-flux-schnell.name: Hugging Face Inference (Flux Schnell)
hf-flux-schnell.notes: Apache 2.0 Flux variant via HF free tier.

hf-flux-dev.name: Hugging Face Inference (Flux Dev)
hf-flux-dev.notes: Flux Dev via HF free tier. Non-commercial license — respect it.

cf-flux-1-schnell.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux-1 Schnell)
cf-flux-1-schnell.notes: 10,000 neurons/day free; ~11 neurons per image. Needs CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN + CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.

cf-flux-2-dev.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux.2 dev)
cf-flux-2-dev.notes: Flux.2 dev on CF — supports reference images for brand consistency. Higher neuron cost.

cf-sdxl.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (SDXL base 1.0)
cf-sdxl.notes: SDXL base on CF; native negative_prompt support.

cf-sdxl-lightning.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (SDXL-Lightning)
cf-sdxl-lightning.notes: Cheapest CF image model — ~2 neurons per image; 4-step Lightning variant.

cf-leonardo-phoenix.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (Leonardo Phoenix 1.0)
cf-leonardo-phoenix.notes: Leonardo Phoenix hosted on CF — free tier.

cf-leonardo-lucid-origin.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (Leonardo Lucid Origin)
cf-leonardo-lucid-origin.notes: Leonardo's most adaptable preset, hosted on CF.

replicate-flux-1.1-pro.name: Replicate (Flux 1.1 Pro)
replicate-flux-1.1-pro.notes: Replicate-hosted Flux 1.1 Pro. Metered per-run; trial credit on signup.

replicate-flux-schnell.name: Replicate (Flux Schnell)
replicate-flux-schnell.notes: Cheapest Replicate image model. Apache 2.0 weights upstream.

replicate-flux-dev.name: Replicate (Flux Dev)
replicate-flux-dev.notes: Flux Dev via Replicate. Non-commercial license — respect it.

replicate-sd3.name: Replicate (Stable Diffusion 3)
replicate-sd3.notes: SD3 Large via Replicate. Commercial license applies.

replicate-recraft-v3.name: Replicate (Recraft V3)
replicate-recraft-v3.notes: Native SVG via Replicate — the fallback path when no direct Recraft key is set.

replicate-ideogram-3.name: Replicate (Ideogram V3)
replicate-ideogram-3.notes: Ideogram 3 via Replicate — best-in-class wordmark rendering.

llm_author_svg.name: This very conversation
llm_author_svg.notes: inline_svg mode — the hosting LLM writes the SVG directly. No external paste needed; it's already in the chat.

satori_template.name: asset_generate_og_image (api mode)
satori_template.notes: OG images are rendered by Satori + @resvg/resvg-js server-side. No external UI needed — call asset_generate_og_image with mode=api.

composite.name: asset_generate_logo with text_content + SVG compositor
composite.notes: For logos with >3-word wordmarks, generate a text-free mark and let the server composite SVG typography. See asset_generate_logo in composite mode.

svg_first.name: Recraft web (Vector style)
svg_first.notes: Primary strategy for favicon: generate a real SVG in Recraft (Vector style), then the server bundles .ico / apple-touch / PWA manifest around it.

composite_mark_on_background.name: asset_generate_splash_screen (api mode)
composite_mark_on_background.notes: Splash screens composite an existing brand mark onto a background. Server-side; no external UI.
